steps.title: Expand and rearrange
steps.content:
Expand the left side: $$3(kx + 13) = 3kx + 39$$

The equation becomes: $$3kx + 39 = \frac{48}{17}x + 36$$

Move all x-terms to one side: $$3kx - \frac{48}{17}x = -3$$ $$\left(3k - \frac{48}{17}\right)x = -3$$

steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content:
A linear equation has no solution when the coefficient of $x$ is zero but the right side is non-zero—creating the impossible statement $0 = -3$.

Set the x-coefficient to zero: $$3k - \frac{48}{17} = 0$$ $$3k = \frac{48}{17}$$ $$k = \frac{48}{51} = \frac{16}{17}$$
The answer is .9411.
